task_completion.description: Verify the survey title and admin notification email are correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Riverside County Community Needs Assessment 2024' in the header or general settings. Check the general settings or administrator details for the admin email 'dr.martinez@riverside-sociology.edu'.

task_completion.description: Verify the welcome and end messages contain the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Text elements' or survey content settings. The Welcome message must contain 'Riverside County' and 'voluntary'. The End message must contain 'thank' AND either 'resource' OR 'support'.

task_completion.description: Verify the end URL is correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Text elements' or end URL settings. The End URL field must be set to 'https://www.riversidecounty.gov/community-resources'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presentation format and navigation settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Presentation' settings. The format should be set to 'Group by group' (or similar group-based presentation). 'Show progress bar' must be enabled/On, and 'Show backward navigation' (back button) must be enabled/On.

task_completion.description: Verify the privacy and data policy settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Data policy' or 'Notification & data management' settings. 'Date stamp' must be enabled/On. 'Save IP address' must be disabled/Off. 'Save referrer URL' must be disabled/Off.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey contains at least two question groups, each with at least one question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure sidebar or overview. There must be at least two distinct question groups visible, and each group must contain at least one question.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator showing the survey is 'Active' or 'Running', or the presence of a 'Stop this survey' button instead of an 'Activate this survey' button.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the LimeSurvey web interface in a browser, not API requests, curl commands, or automated scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual LimeSurvey application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the standard LimeSurvey admin dashboard, not a text editor, local HTML mockup, or database management tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal windows running SQL commands (like INSERT or UPDATE) to configure the survey settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Welcome message must contain 'Riverside' (or 'Riverside County') and 'voluntary'. End message must contain 'thank' AND either 'resource' OR 'support'. The end URL must be exactly 'https://www.riversidecounty.gov/community-resources' and admin email 'dr.martinez@riverside-sociology.edu' despite being fictitious domains.
